name: igniteiq-port
description: Port Claude Design exports into the IgniteIQ WordPress theme. Fetches handoff URLs, diffs against live staging, edits cli.php and template-parts byte-accurately, then stops for review before commit. Bundles the Microsoft Playwright MCP so visual fidelity checks (navigate, screenshot, get_html against staging) work directly from a Cowork session — Claude no longer needs the Mac-local /visual-iiq-diff round-trip. Deploy to staging is automated via GitHub Action on push to main.
